race.comment: SOLAR MIST (2) finished out of the money two starts back then was beaten 2.25 lengths when fourth over 1620m at Donald two weeks ago. Finds a nice race and can figure in the finish. FLYING JUDE (14) was returning from a break last time out and proved too classy, scoring by a long neck over 1400m at Bendigo. Open to plenty of improvement and looks a big threat again. SWEATER GIRL (13) overcame a wide barrier last time to place and finish 5.5 lengths away over 1500m at this track. Nice effort last time and in the mix. THOUGHTFUL (3) is stepping out at this track for the first time. Last appeared when he finished second over 1350m at Donald on June 20. Fitter and can threaten
